hooks.command: CWD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_HOOK_INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd // empty'); FOLDER=$(basename "${CWD:-$PWD}") && osascript -e "display notification \"Waiting for input\" with title \"Claude Code — $FOLDER\"" && say "Claude needs input in $FOLDER"

CWD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_HOOK_INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd // empty'); FOLDER=$(basename "${CWD:-$PWD}") && osascript -e "display notification \"Claude is done\" with title \"Claude Code — $FOLDER\"" && say "Claude is done in $FOLDER"
